title: RPG-Steven's Kaleidoscope-Amazing Magic
description:
More enchantments,potions,magic weapons,new dimension,structrues. 
You can add attributes to your items by using some powerful cores. 
Support to customize almost all powerful cores,enchantments,magic weapons,you can change their attributes.
body:
Awaken the Hero Within: Embark on an Epic RPG Journey in Your World!

Tired of the same old rewards? Get ready for a radically transformed adventure—every chest could contain legendary treasures, and every structure hides the secrets of powerful artifacts! Explore mysterious dimensions and breathtaking structures,each filled with unique enchanted weapons, rare magical items, and game-changing gear that will redefine combat!

But that’s only the beginning: this world is both dangerous and full of opportunities! Hostile creatures now spawn randomly across the land, armed with weapons infused with special skills and magical powers. defeat them, seize their loot, and empower your journey! What makes these items truly extraordinary? Cores & Enchantments—a revolutionary gear upgrade and customization system like never before! 

With powerful Cores,you can countless times to strengthen armor, weapons attributes,(You can customize the limit) and even unlock new abilities. Want armor that automatically grants potion effects like Strength, Speed, Jump Boost, and Water Breathing? 

Or a weapon with enhanced base damage and attack speed? The Core system lets you freely build your ultimate gear.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c55682f2f4d59f25d6911a52f05479d0e2245c4a.png)

You can find cores from the structrues in this new dimension,this is the teleport structure：

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e82c9e18908bdc16eb3f26d2f3a30b44666a40d.png)


And when it comes to Enchantments—get ready for mind-blowing effects:

Air Jump: Move freely through the air—leap over cliffs and ruins with ease!

Trident Flight: you can left click to control the flight trajectory of it,the Trident will damage all creatures that pass through (AoE damage) also you can use other enchantment to make make the Trident bigger 

You can sit on it to fly(Shift+Right Click) with the enchantment:TRIDENT_RIDER

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1482705533e82eee9d3d78c08103386b7b5d344.gif)

using:/give @s trident{Enchantments:[{id:"skam:cursed_trident",lvl:20}]}

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e615f9abca29bef59813dfb7d1a56260fc66bb3.png)

Summon Thunder: Call down lightning even without rain—wield divine power at your command.

Tailor enchantments, weapons, and Cores to fit your combat style. Every setting can be easily adjusted in the config/skam folder.

Ready to redefine your Minecraft experience? Every exploration could lead to legend!

Download now and step into a new realm full of exploration, strategy, and magic.
